name: Sprint 1: Relief and Control
focus: Make NEXT.io less chaotic before adding more ambition.
rule: If it does not reduce executional drag, ownership drift, or alert fatigue, it waits.

name: Sprint 2: Commercial Confidence
focus: Turn pricing, GTM, targets and forecasting from gut feel into scorecards.
rule: One live NEXT.io decision must become easier to defend each week.

name: Sprint 3: Market Contact and Proof
focus: Make Strait Up Growth touch the market and produce proof.
rule: No more offer polishing unless a human outside your immediate circle has reacted to it.

name: Sprint 4: Manual AI Workflows
focus: Prove workflows manually before building agents, apps or automations.
rule: No agent until the manual workflow has been used repeatedly and would be missed if removed.

name: Sprint 5: Authority and Network
focus: Turn your real opinions, work lessons and Singapore ambition into public authority and relationships.
rule: Visibility must create conversations, not vanity activity.

name: Sprint 6: Package and Automate
focus: Package what worked, kill what did not, and automate only the proven parts.
rule: Build only what has earned its place.
